items.claim: Fared Basharat has gone to a decision in five of his six UFC fights.
items.quote: Of the six UFC fights, five of them have gone to decision.

items.claim: Fared Basharat possesses high-level striking defense that makes him difficult to hit.
items.quote: the best thing about Bosrod is like striking defense. It's it's hard to find him. It's hard to hit him.

items.claim: Fared Basharat is a high-level wrestler capable of smothering opponents against the cage.
items.quote: when he couldn't get the takedown, smotherthered him up against the cage, never gave the guy a second to operate.

items.claim: John Garza has questionable durability, having been knocked out two years ago.
items.quote: just two years ago, um John Garza got knocked out by Gilberto Mara.

items.claim: John Garza has questionable wrestling defense.
items.quote: I'm not sold on his wrestling defense.

items.claim: John Garza has a history of missing weight in previous promotions.
items.quote: if you look back on a lot of his fights, him versus Nicholas Gala, he came in at 136.2. Him versus Armando Zuniga, he was 137.4.
